methodology: Each violation is keyed by theme + path + ruleId + CSS-selector. RTL-exclusive = key in RTL only. RTL-amplified = key in more RTL than LTR records.

rtlExclusive.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.47 (foreground color: #191919, background color: #91670e, font size: 9.8pt (13px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
